customers.name: Rahul
customers.profile: High-value salaried customer exploring a premium home loan, wealth advisory, and priority banking upgrade. Prefers quick summaries, low paperwork, and clear EMI comparisons.

history.notes: Discussed home loan eligibility for INR 85 lakh property, premium banking upgrade, and salary account benefits. Asked for a side-by-side EMI estimate for 15 and 20 year tenure.
Requested pre-approved loan limits, processing fee waiver options, and document checklist for income proof and property papers.

customers.name: Elon Musk
customers.profile: Ultra high-net-worth entrepreneur customer with treasury, investment, and liquidity management needs. Requires discreet service, rapid approvals, and consolidated portfolio snapshots.

history.notes: Asked for liquidity planning across operating accounts, short-term debt instruments, and tax-efficient investment options.
Requested faster approval workflow for large transfers and a single-page risk summary before market close.

customers.name: Shria Sannuthi
customers.profile: SME owner evaluating working capital renewal, overdraft enhancement, and vendor payment automation. Prefers practical guidance and document-ready next steps.

history.notes: Requested document checklist for working capital renewal, GST statement review, and projected cash-flow format.
Discussed vendor payment delays, receivables cycle, and option to increase overdraft limit before seasonal inventory purchase.

customers.name: Trump
customers.profile: High-profile customer with large real-estate, hospitality, and campaign-related banking needs. Requires enhanced due diligence, senior relationship handling, and careful compliance review.

history.notes: Requested consolidated view of loan exposure, collateral status, and upcoming repayment schedule for real-estate linked facilities.
Flagged for senior approval workflow before new credit sanction or high-value outward remittance.
